marked_clade_leaf_count: How many taxa are in the marked clade?
Count the descendant taxa inside the marked clade.
What is the number of labeled taxa descending from the marked clade?
The highlighted branch marks one clade. How many terminal taxa does that clade contain?
Find the marked clade and count its descendant taxon labels. How many are there?
sister_leaf_label: Which taxon label is the sister taxon of "{query_label}"?
Find the leaf that shares the most recent parent branch with "{query_label}". What is its label?
What is the label of the sister taxon paired with "{query_label}"?
In the cladogram, which terminal taxon shares an immediate parent with "{query_label}"?
mrca_leaf_count: How many taxa descend from the most recent common ancestor of "{query_label_a}" and "{query_label_b}"?
Find the smallest clade containing "{query_label_a}" and "{query_label_b}". How many terminal taxa are in it?
What is the number of taxa in the clade rooted at the most recent common ancestor of "{query_label_a}" and "{query_label_b}"?
Trace back from "{query_label_a}" and "{query_label_b}" to their most recent common ancestor. How many descendant taxa does that ancestor have?
Count the terminal taxa in the MRCA clade for "{query_label_a}" and "{query_label_b}".
topology_outlier_label: Three options have the same rooted topology, ignoring branch order and layout. Which option is the outlier?
Which option has a different rooted clade structure from the other three options?
Ignoring rotations and drawing layout, select the one cladogram whose topology differs.
Find the option whose set of nested clades is not the same as the other options.
Which labeled option is the topology outlier?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:marked_clade_leaf_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x,y] pixel points at the terminal centers of every descendant taxon in the marked clade
query:marked_clade_leaf_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of descendant taxa in the marked clade as an integer

query:sister_leaf_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point at the center of the sister taxon leaf
query:sister_leaf_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the sister taxon label as a string exactly as shown

query:mrca_leaf_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x,y] pixel points at the terminal centers of every taxon descending from the most recent common ancestor
query:mrca_leaf_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of taxa descending from the most recent common ancestor as an integer

query:topology_outlier_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected option panel
query:topology_outlier_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact option letter of the topology outlier
